title: Use `then/2` to pipe into a function whose arg is not first
prompt:
Refactor this code:

```
def publish(post) do
  body = build_body(post)
  full = String.replace(body, "{title}", post.title)
  String.upcase(full)
end
```

Rewrite as a pipeline starting from `post`. The tricky step is `String.replace(body, "{title}", post.title)` — `post` is not the first argument of `replace/3`. Use `then/2` to pipe through that step. Output a complete `defmodule MyApp.Publisher do ... end`.
tier_rationale: Knowledge of `then/2` as the escape hatch for non-first-arg piping. Sonnet often gives up and falls back to intermediate variables.
